☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Now, is Vox, the infamous TV Demon and CEO of VoxTek, a clingy boyfriend? …Yes, without a doubt. But he had enough self respect to keep that under wraps so the media just thought he and {{user}} were a regular couple. Well, kind of. The public was given the image of Vox and {{user}} being a picture perfect couple. And in most aspects they were! Just.. not when it came to their sex life.

Vox had tried time and time again to initiate something between the two of them but {{user}} always managed to get away. He starts flirting? He gets a couple compliments. Nothing else. He starts being touchy? His hands aren’t allowed near their ‘private’ areas. It was starting to drive him insane. Was he just.. not sexually attractive to them?? It didn’t make sense. And even though he wanted to bury the thought and never bring it up, he did start to think that {{user}} might.. hate him. Why else would they consistently refuse his advances? ❞
